title: Briefcase + shell E2E contract (002-stitch-theme-briefcase)
description: Playwright tests cover home (no canvas), home↔briefcase (FR-008), home→game (FR-009), canvas on /game, deep link /briefcase, Briefcase Main Menu chrome (FR-010a–e): difficulty as three radio tiles (not select), reduced-motion smoke, and English copy.

home.description: Main entry; DOM only; no GameCanvasShell.

rootTestId.description: Root container data-testid on the Briefcase page.

navToBriefcaseTestId.description: data-testid on home control navigating to /briefcase.

navToHomeTestId.description: data-testid on Briefcase (or shared nav) navigating to /.

navToGameTestId.description: data-testid on home control navigating to /game.

canvasHostTestId.description: data-testid on canvas (or wrapper) on /game only—not present on home.

briefcaseSeedInputTestId.description: data-testid on Briefcase seed text input (FR-010d).

briefcaseBackdropTestId.description: data-testid on Briefcase page-level decorative backdrop layer (FR-010e); present on /briefcase only.

briefcaseDifficultyTestId.description: data-testid on Briefcase difficulty radiogroup host (FR-010a): three tile-style radio options Easy/Medium/Hard; not a select.

briefcaseGlassPanelTestId.description: data-testid on frosted / glass-style panel region (FR-010b).

briefcaseUnlockShowcaseTestId.description: data-testid on Unlock showcase primary control (FR-010c).

primaryHeadingTestId.description: Optional: data-testid for main H1-level heading.
